recommendations.title: Paperman
recommendations.overview: An urban office worker finds that paper airplanes are instrumental in meeting a girl in ways he never expected.

recommendations.title: Home Team
recommendations.overview: Two years after a Super Bowl win when NFL head coach Sean Payton is suspended, he goes back to his hometown and finds himself reconnecting with his 12-year-old son by coaching his Pop Warner football team.

recommendations.title: Big Stan
recommendations.overview: A weak con man panics when he learns he's going to prison for fraud. He hires a mysterious martial arts guru who helps transform him into a martial arts expert who can fight off inmates who want to hurt or love him.

recommendations.title: Condorito: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Condorito must find a way to rescue his mother in law from an ancient race of aliens which wants to enslave the universe once again.

recommendations.title: The Star
recommendations.overview: A small but brave donkey and his animal friends become the unsung heroes of the greatest story ever told: the first Christmas.

recommendations.title: Lake Placid vs. Anaconda
recommendations.overview: A giant alligator goes head to head with a giant Anaconda. The town sheriff must find a way to destroy the two monsters before they kill the whole town.

recommendations.title: Mary and Max
recommendations.overview: A tale of friendship between two unlikely pen pals: Mary, a lonely, eight-year-old girl living in the suburbs of Melbourne, and Max, a forty-four-year old, severely obese man living in New York.

recommendations.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
recommendations.overview: In a world where walking, talking, digitally connected bots have become children's best friends, an 11-year-old finds that his robot buddy doesn't quite work the same as the others do.

recommendations.title: Latte and the Magic Waterstone
recommendations.overview: When a greedy bear steals a magic stone to keep the forest’s water for himself, a brave hedgehog and a timid squirrel must work together to retrieve it.
recommendations.director: Nina Wels, Andrea Deppert, Regina Welker, Mimi Maynard

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.
